name: Attio

evidence.claim: Attio provides a REST API, App SDK, and an official MCP server.
Developers can self-serve and create API credentials through the Attio developer portal.
Search citation: Attio: Ask more from CRM

api_notes: The API provides comprehensive read/write access to the CRM data model (contacts, companies, deals, lists, tasks, etc.).
auth_notes: The API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication with user-scoped permissions.
one_liner: Attio is an AI-native CRM platform that allows users to manage pipeline, customer data, and go-to-market workflows.
access_notes: Developers can create a developer account and register API Apps themselves via the Attio developer portal without explicit admin approval or a paid plan requirement.
mcp_notes: Attio provides an official MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that allows for full read/write access and tool execution for agents.
